text:
此度の戦い、見事だったぞ。
こうして共に戦うと、おぬしの
戦士としての実力がよく分かる。

何より、われと共に在っても
揺るがぬ心。大物なのか
鈍いのかは判然とせんがな。

……同行を求めた理由は
われと共に戦うこと自体が
試練となるからでもあるのだ。

われの存在で心を乱すようでは
抜剣ヤミガラスを持つには厳し

Your fighting was most impressive. I now see
firsthand your prowess as a warrior.

You remained unflinching even in my
presence, though I cannot decide if that is
a testament to greatness or thick-headedness
on your part.

The reason I asked to accompany you
was because the trial was for you to fight
alongside me.

Were you to waver in my presence,
carrying the Yamigarasu Katana would
be difficult indeed.
